remaining: Click-to-focus should show same visual as Tab-focus (currently delayed by 33ms render tick)
Borderless widget focus shows left-edge bar — user likes the 3D look but UX intent unclear
Cross-platform clipboard verification (arboard untested on Linux/macOS)

decisions: McGugan Box right border uses U+2595 fallback instead of U+1FB87 for broad terminal support
Context menus use active_overlay pattern (not screen push) to preserve underlying content
30fps render tick drives animations — ratatui diff makes unchanged frames nearly free
Removed 3D button depth (black splits) — McGugan border is sufficient
fr units in CSS promote to flex_grow for flex children

Test clipboard (Ctrl+C copy, Ctrl+V paste) in Input widget
Decide on borderless focus indicator style (left-edge bar vs something else)
